user.title: AIRSEEKERS
user.description: Add your AIRSEEKERS robot. Start with the 'stub' backend to validate everything without a real connection. Real backends (cloud_http, local_http, mqtt) are completed later from verified protocol discovery.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate AIRSEEKERS
reauth_confirm.description: Your AIRSEEKERS session has expired. Enter your account credentials again.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the backend.
error.backend_not_ready: This backend is not implemented yet. Use the 'stub' backend for now (see docs/api_mapping.md).

init.title: AIRSEEKERS options
init.description: Adjust polling, cameras, and maintenance settings. Note: with cloud backends a single session per account exists — short polling can log the phone app out.

data.enable_all_cameras: Enable all cameras (not only preferred roles)
data.privacy_mode: Privacy mode (do not expose camera images)
